tools.name: __node_version
tools.description: Get the Node.js version used by the MCP server

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all Neon projects in your account.

cursor.description: Specify the cursor value from the previous response to retrieve the next batch of projects.

limit.description: Specify a value from 1 to 400 to limit number of projects in the response.

search.description: Search by project name or id. You can specify partial name or id values to filter results.

name.description: An optional name of the project to create.

projectId.description: The ID of the project to delete
The ID of the project to describe

tools.name: run_sql
tools.description: Execute a single SQL statement against a Neon database

databaseName.description: The name of the database to execute the query against

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to execute the query against

tools.name: run_sql_transaction
tools.description: Execute a SQL transaction against a Neon database, should be used for multiple SQL statements

databaseName.description: The name of the database to execute the query against

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to execute the query against

tools.name: describe_table_schema
tools.description: Describe the schema of a table in a Neon database

databaseName.description: The name of the database to get the table schema from

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch to execute the query against

tools.name: get_database_tables
tools.description: Get all tables in a Neon database

branchId.description: An optional ID of the branch

tools.name: create_branch
tools.description: Create a branch in a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project to create the branch in

branchName.description: An optional name for the branch

tools.name: prepare_database_migration
tools.description: Prepare a database migration, creating a temporary branch and applying the migration SQL there. Returns migration details.

migrationSql.description: The SQL to execute to create the migration

databaseName.description: The name of the database to execute the query against

projectId.description: The ID of the project to execute the query against

tools.name: complete_database_migration
tools.description: Complete a database migration when the user confirms the migration is ready to be applied to the main branch. This tool also deletes the temporary branch.

tools.name: describe_branch
tools.description: Get a tree view of all objects in a branch, including databases, schemas, tables, views, and functions

branchId.description: An ID of the branch to describe

tools.name: delete_branch
tools.description: Delete a branch from a Neon project

projectId.description: The ID of the project containing the branch

branchId.description: The ID of the branch to delete
